documentation:
## Aliyun ROS DCDN Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as DCDN from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-dcdn';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.Domain

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.Domain.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.Domain.attr_cname
documentation: Attribute Cname: The CNAME generated for the CDN domain.You must add a CNAME record with your DNS provider to map the CDN domain name to the CNAME.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.Domain.attr_domain_name
documentation:
Attribute DomainName: The CDN domain name.

Wildcard domain names that start with periods (.) are supported. For example, .a.com.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DCDN::Domain`, which is used to add a Dynamic Route for CDN (DCDN) domain name.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosDomain\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dcdn-domain>

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.DomainProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Domain`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dcdn-domain>

```
param domain_name

Property domainName: The DCDN domain name. Wildcard domain names that start with periods (.) are supported. For example, .a.com.

param sources

Property sources: The list of origin URLs.

param check_url

Property checkUrl: The validation of the origin.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group. If this is left blank, the system automatically fills in the ID of the default resource group.

param scope

Property scope: Valid values: domestic, overseas, and global. Default value: domestic. The setting is supported for users outside mainland China, users in mainland China of level 3 or above.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

param top_level_domain

Property topLevelDomain: The top-level domain, which can only be configured by users on the whitelist.
```

documentation: :Attribute: DomainName: The CDN domain name. Wildcard domain names that start with periods (.) are supported. For example, .a.com.

documentation: :Property: domainName: The DCDN domain name. Wildcard domain names that start with periods (.) are supported. For example, .a.com.

documentation: :Property: checkUrl: The validation of the origin.

documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group. If this is left blank, the system automatically fills in the ID of the default resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.scope
documentation: :Property: scope: Valid values: domestic, overseas, and global. Default value: domestic. The setting is supported for users outside mainland China, users in mainland China of level 3 or above.

documentation: :Property: tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.SourcesProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param content: true
param port: true
param priority: true
param type: true
param weight: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.SourcesProperty.content
documentation: :Property: content: The address of the origin server. You can specify an IP address or a domain name.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.SourcesProperty.type
documentation:
:Property:

type: The type of the origin server. Valid values:
ipaddr: the IP address
domain: the domain name
oss: the endpoint of an Object Storage Service (OSS) bucket
fc_domain: the domain name of Function Compute

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.SourcesProperty.port
documentation:
:Property:

port: The port. Valid values:
80: the default port
443: the HTTPS port
A custom port

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.SourcesProperty.priority
documentation:
:Property:

priority: The priority of the origin server if multiple origin servers are specified. Default value: 20. Valid values:
20: the primary origin server
30: the secondary origin server

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.SourcesProperty.weight
documentation: :Property: weight: The weight of the origin server if multiple origin servers are specified. Valid values: 0 to 100. Default value: 10.

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.TagsProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param key: true
param value: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.TagsProperty.key
documentation: :Property: key: undefined

methods.name: ros_cdk_dcdn.RosDomain.TagsProperty.value
documentation: :Property: value: undefined

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::DCDN::Domain`, which is used to add a Dynamic Route for CDN (DCDN) domain name.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Domain` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-dcdn-domain>
